bounded_unknowns: The exact per-provider tokenizer census and provider settings remain deferred to emission actuals; this ruling rules them recorded-as-deferred for the pre-gate requirement, it does not close the emission-time actual census.

The calibration run's outcome is future; this record authorizes the synthetic-only run but cannot itself prove the frozen floors (agreement >= 0.80, kappa >= 0.60) will be met -- the run walks L8 to TRUE or fails honestly.
The synthetic-only guard is enforced in code at run time; this record attests the authorization scope, not the run-time enforcement, which the run's own evidence must show.
This ruling advances checklist lines L8 and L4 only; it does not attest the remaining lines (L11, L12), which the post-fix walk must re-verify before signature.

rationale: Owner gate-walk closeout ruling (AskUserQuestion interview, Claude Code coordinator session, 2026-07-17, America/Sao_Paulo) recorded against the WARDEN FREEZE-CHECKLIST walk (evidence/gate-walk/CHECKLIST-WALK-2026-07-17.md). Interview C authorizes the grader calibration run now: the R6 scoring cast scores permanently-tainted SYNTHETIC calibration items only, via the OpenRouter route, against the frozen floors (categorical agreement >= 0.80 and Cohen's kappa >= 0.60 per primary defect family, owner-frozen replacement rule where kappa is undefined), with zero real-item bytes egress, the synthetic-only guard enforced in code, cost well under USD 1 bounded by the R6 census, and evidence landing in evidence/grader-calibration/ -- walking L8 to TRUE or failing honestly. Interview D rules that a sealed, disclosed deferral record satisfies the checklist's 'record all settings, tokenizers' requirement for the pre-exposure gate, consistent with the R6 census ruling; provider settings and the per-provider tokenizer census stand recorded-as-deferred to emission actuals, with the exact actuals still closing at emission. No real-item provider contact, no live target scoring, no key-content exposure, and no merge is authorized, and the pre-exposure gate remains unsigned.
